To apply, click the 'Apply Now' button on any job card. This will open your email client with a pre-filled subject.
Applying is easy: just click the 'Apply Now' button on the job you're interested in.
You can apply by hitting the 'Apply Now' button – it will open your email app ready to send.
Click the 'Post a Job' button at the top of the page, fill out the form, and submit. You'll be redirected to the payment page.
To post a job, use the 'Post a Job' button in the header. Complete the form and make the payment.
Posting a job is easy: click 'Post a Job', fill in the details, and proceed to payment.
You can reach us at support@skillmatch.in or call +91 98765 43210.
Our support email is support@skillmatch.in. Phone: +91 98765 43210.
For any queries, drop an email to support@skillmatch.in or call us at +91 98765 43210.
Jobs expire 30 days after the posted date. Expired jobs are hidden from the list and show a 'Job has expired' label.
After 30 days, a job expires. It will no longer appear in the job listings.
Jobs automatically expire 30 days from the date they are posted.
